blocked_prediction_inputs.blocked_input: PDB coordinates or mmCIF coordinates before sealing
blocked_prediction_inputs.reason: coordinates would leak state-specific structural truth

blocked_prediction_inputs.blocked_input: coordinate-derived contacts, distances, or native contact maps
blocked_prediction_inputs.reason: V47 tests mechanism grammar, not contact lookup
predicted coordinate models are blocked as evidence

blocked_prediction_inputs.blocked_input: UniProt PDB-derived secondary-structure features before sealing
blocked_prediction_inputs.reason: helix/beta records with PDB evidence are coordinate-adjacent and excluded
runtime artifacts are audit outputs only
holdouts open only after sealed prediction hash exists

blocked_prediction_inputs.blocked_input: answer key or pass/fail status during prediction
blocked_prediction_inputs.reason: classification must use source-separated allowed evidence
RfaH label alone cannot create a full fold-switch packet
generic function cannot explain CTD alpha/beta metamorphic switching
non-RfaH metamorphic examples cannot validate RfaH-specific predictions
